_description: Additive PreToolUse registration snippet for the capability-gate refactor. Consumer-repo migration (user-owned) merges these two hooks entries into the project's existing .claude/settings.json under hooks.PreToolUse[].hooks. Use this file if your migration pipeline is additive (preserves existing hook chains). If your migration is a full-copy of harness/settings.json, this file is redundant -- the canonical harness/settings.json already carries both registrations (see commit c3442b7).
